sections.changelog:
0.1.7

  • Introduces the interactive flagship concept, system viewer, five-level BOM pyramid, and mission-profile brief.

0.1.6

  • Improves public navigation and search quality by removing unavailable pages from the customer-facing catalog.

0.1.5

  • Refines public search, feeds, sitemaps, and robots controls while strengthening catalog record integrity checks.

0.1.4

  • Improves homepage accessibility, social metadata, favicon behavior, and asset loading while preserving commerce pages.

0.1.3

  • Improves narrow-screen layout for long model identifiers and updates public labels for clearer engineering decisions.

0.1.2

  • Adds deterministic homepage description and WebSite/WebPage structured data with Rank Math integration and a guarded fallback.

0.1.1

  • Adds an in-body runtime marker for independent deployment verification.

0.1.0

  • Introduces source-backed configuration records, compatibility conditions, a public healthcheck, and an update fallback.
